name: Mayur Kale
education: M.Sc.(computer Science), Computer Science from university of pune ,Computer Science Dept.
headline: Senior software engineer (SDE-III) at Microsoft | Ex-Adobe | Ex-Amazon
about:
Senior Software Engineer with 12+ years of experience building large-scale distributed systems, backend platforms, and performance-critical software across enterprise and cloud-scale products.

Currently working with the Microsoft Teams Files platform at Microsoft, designing and developing distributed backend services and platform features powering file experiences used by millions of users globally. My work focuses on scalable system design, authentication infrastructure, distributed workflows, and platform performance optimization.

Previously, I worked at Adobe on the Adobe PDF Print Engine, contributing to high-performance C++ systems programming, rendering algorithms, and memory management for enterprise-scale document processing systems. Earlier in my career at Amazon, I developed distributed backend services for the Sort Center logistics platform, building systems that processed millions of package events daily.

I enjoy solving complex infrastructure and scalability challenges, designing systems that are efficient, reliable, and simple to operate at scale.

Core Skills

• Distributed Systems & Backend Platform Engineering

 • Algorithms, Data Structures & System Design

 • High-Performance Systems Programming (C/C++)

 • Cloud & Scalable Backend Services

 • Authentication, Security & Platform Reliability

Technologies: Java, C++, C#, Python, Distributed Systems, Microservices, AWS, MySQL, Oracle, Linux, REST APIs, Multi-threading

licenseAndCertificates.name: Data Science Foundations: Choosing the Right Database

recommendationsReceived.name: Ahana Ghosh
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Strategy & Data transformation | Scaling Gen AI systems for Global MNC
recommendationsReceived.context: Ahana worked with Mayur on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: Mayur is very technically very sound. He is great at analytical, designing and debugging skills. He had been a very helpful teammate throughout. It was a pleasure working with him.

recommendationsReceived.name: Ankit Sharma
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Founder | Business Systems | Scalable systems from IoT to Data centers, Backend, Frontend, ML, CV | Leadership | Strategy
recommendationsReceived.context: Ankit worked with Mayur on the same team
recommendationsReceived.description: I worked with Mayur at Adobe from 2014 to 2016 in Print-team. He is quite knowledgeable and laborious person. He works on things in hand with passion until he solves them. We used to discuss many project related problems together, or to participate in Adobe’s new project initiation program. We explored different aspects of print tech and system details, one of the major one I remember is: “He had to write code for one persistent cache mechanism for print engine on ARM architecture. So, when we discussed, my thinking was more towards system level control since by that we can provide the fastest access, and his thinking was towards controlling more data. We both discussed each other’s ideas in detail and found that for that scenario more data handling was more important than latency, so he ended up implementing that cache mechanism based on Key-mapped lookups.” By the nature also, Mayur is quite positive person, and remain motivated towards professional work as well contributing back towards society to minimize any pitfalls he can work on.

recommendations.name: Nidhi  Raina
recommendations.subtitle: Driving Expansion & Growth by helping companies land top Engineering Talent and bootstrapping their IDC/GCC in India! |Startup Team Builder (0→1→10→100)| Storyteller |
recommendations.description: I recommend Nidhi as a great person with good human relationship and nice experience in recruitment. She is very dedicated, full of energy and very hard working. She has acquired some of the top talents across teams. I would say that she is very helpful,honest,really passionate about what she is doing and above all her methods of communication always spread a positive energy. She successfully holds both the interest of the company and that of the candidate in her mind at all times. The result is the right candidate for the right job. She is surely an asset to any company and department.

recommendations.name: Ahana Ghosh
recommendations.subtitle: Strategy & Data transformation | Scaling Gen AI systems for Global MNC
recommendations.context: Mayur worked with Ahana on the same team
recommendations.description: I worked with Ahana in Amazon. Ahana did an exceptional job on projects in transportation group in Amazon. As I remember, she was a very productive person and is a multi-skilled person with vast knowledge. she is careful, proactive, self motivated and intelligent team player. It’s a pleasure working with Ahana.

recommendations.name: Md A.
recommendations.subtitle: Associate Director -Talent Acquisition at PayU | Ex-Adobe
recommendations.context: Mayur worked with Md but on different teams
recommendations.description: I recommend Amim as a great person with good human relationship and nice experience in recruitment. He is very dedicated, full of energy and very hard working. summary: Mayur Kale is currently a software engineer at Microsoft working on AI-driven product solutions within a large enterprise/growth-stage context. His posts frequently cover applied AI and data science (e.g., Sherlock & the OCV AI Playground for customer feedback analysis), systems-level troubleshooting (kernel-mode driver issues), and industry commentary on emerging tech like EVs and ADAS/autonomy. He blends technical depth with people-centered leadership — actively hiring (levels 61–65, Hyderabad), doing campus outreach, and sharing career and culture notes from his journeys through Adobe, Amazon, and Microsoft. His tone alternates between practical technical analysis and personable storytelling: troubleshooting root causes, explaining ADAS levels, celebrating team milestones, and sharing human moments (caregiver leave, an inspiring roadside interaction). He shows a clear pattern of problem-solving and knowledge-sharing, posting technical explanations, recruiting calls-to-action, resource links, and community advocacy (environmental cleanups, university placements). The unique value in his content is the mix of hands-on engineering credibility (AI, systems, ADAS) with recruiting, mentoring, and candid perspectives on Indian tech/product culture and ethics.
